name: Gyomei Himejima
description: [Absolutely LOVE this thumbnail😸] Gyomei Himejima, also known as the "Stone Hashira," holds the position of the highest-ranked stone pillar within the Demon Slayer Corps. Despite his intimidating appearance and immense physical strength, Gyomei is known for his gentle and compassionate nature. He lost both his sight and hearing during a past battle but relies on his heightened senses and remarkable ability to detect demonic presence through his stone-based techniques.
creator: Melody_.
